text:
No person shall occupy a house trailer while it is being moved upon a public highway.

DIRECTION OF TRAVEL; OVERTAKING AND PASSING
markdown:
## Title 43
### Chapter 484B
##### § 484B.167 — Riding in house trailer.

No person shall occupy a house trailer while it is being moved upon a public highway.

DIRECTION OF TRAVEL; OVERTAKING AND PASSING

subsections.text: No person shall occupy a house trailer while it is being moved upon a public highway.
DIRECTION OF TRAVEL; OVERTAKING AND PASSING
